{"id":"project-LICHEN-uuhr","title":"TUI observe task cancel in on_unmount is not awaited","description":"File: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py
Lines: 260-264

The on_unmount method cancels _receive_task but cannot await it since on_unmount is synchronous:

    def on_unmount(self) -> None:
        """Called on shutdown - cleanup."""
        if self._receive_task is not None:
            self._receive_task.cancel()
        # Radio cleanup happens in action_quit

This cancels the task but doesn't wait for cancellation to complete. The task may still be executing cleanup code when the app exits, potentially causing:
1. Warnings about unfinished tasks
2. Incomplete cleanup of simulator state
3. Race conditions if resources are released before task finishes

Impact: Unclean shutdown, potential resource cleanup races.
Note: action_quit() also cancels this task, so on_unmount is redundant for the quit path, but matters if the app is unmounted through other means.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:57.452056Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:57.452091Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-uuhr","title":"TUI observe task cancel in on_unmount is not awaited","description":"File: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py
Lines: 260-264

The on_unmount method cancels _receive_task but cannot await it since on_unmount is synchronous:

    def on_unmount(self) -> None:
        """Called on shutdown - cleanup."""
        if self._receive_task is not None:
            self._receive_task.cancel()
        # Radio cleanup happens in action_quit

This cancels the task but doesn't wait for cancellation to complete. The task may still be executing cleanup code when the app exits, potentially causing:
1. Warnings about unfinished tasks
2. Incomplete cleanup of simulator state
3. Race conditions if resources are released before task finishes

Impact: Unclean shutdown, potential resource cleanup races.
Note: action_quit() also cancels this task, so on_unmount is redundant for the quit path, but matters if the app is unmounted through other means.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:57.452056Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:08.477957461Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:08.477957461Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:30:08.477957461Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:08.477957461Z"}
